text.title: PLG Optimization Tactics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping the observable funnel-weakness signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a numeric baseline available for the funnel weakness?

conclusion.verdict: STOP — instrument the metric before drafting tactics

branch.question: Is the weak step before or after Aha moment?
Are upgrade prompts firing before 80% of limit?

conclusion.verdict: rewrite copy with named customer + quantified value
ship PQL-targeted prompts; sample from expansion-signals

text.example: baseline=true → stage=free_to_paid → prompts_at_limit_pct=1.0 → prompt-at-80-percent → move prompts to 80%.
